option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <!-- App Name and Branding --> <string name="app_name">ReadingNook Memory+</string> <string name="app_tagline">Your Personal Library</string>
<!-- Navigation and Actions --> <string name="nav_library">Library</string> <string name="nav_reader">Reader</string> <string name="nav_notes">Notes</string> <string name="nav_settings">Settings</string>
<!-- Auth Screen --> <string name="auth_welcome">Welcome to ReadingNook</string> <string name="auth_subtitle">Your personal library awaits</string> <string name="auth_login_button">Get Started</string> <string name="auth_guest_mode">Continue as Guest</string> <string name="auth_login_title">Sign In</string> <string name="auth_sign_up_title">Sign Up</string> <string name="auth_sign_up_button">Create Account</string> <string name="auth_forgot_password">Forgot Password?</string> <string name="auth_send_reset_button">Send Reset Link</string> <string name="auth_forgot_password_title">Reset Password</string> <string name="auth_forgot_password_description">Enter your email address and we\'ll send you a link to reset your password.</string>
<!-- Input Hints --> <string name="auth_email_hint">Email address</string> <string name="auth_password_hint">Password</string> <string name="auth_name_hint">Full name</string> <string name="auth_confirm_password_hint">Confirm password</string>
<!-- Bookshelf Screen --> <string name="bookshelf_title">My Library</string> <string name="bookshelf_empty_title">No Books Yet</string> <string name="bookshelf_empty_message">Upload your first PDF book to get started</string> <string name="bookshelf_upload_button">Upload Book</string> <string name="bookshelf_search_hint">Search books...</string> <string name="bookshelf_filter_all">All Books</string> <string name="bookshelf_filter_downloaded">Downloaded</string> <string name="bookshelf_filter_reading">Reading</string> <string name="bookshelf_filter_completed">Completed</string>
<!-- Reader Screen --> <string name="reader_progress">%1$d/%2$d pages</string> <string name="reader_bookmark_added">Bookmark added</string> <string name="reader_bookmark_removed">Bookmark removed</string> <string name="reader_note_created">Note created</string> <string name="reader_menu_bookmarks">Bookmarks</string> <string name="reader_menu_notes">Notes</string> <string name="reader_menu_settings">Settings</string> <string name="reader_menu_translate">Translate</string> <string name="reader_original">Original</string> <string name="reader_translated">Translated</string>
<!-- Word Detail --> <string name="word_english_meaning">English Meaning</string> <string name="word_hinglish_explanation">Hinglish Explanation</string> <string name="word_example_sentence">Example Sentence</string> <string name="word_original_context">Original Context</string> <string name="word_save_to_notes">Save to Notes</string> <string name="word_original_sentence">Original Sentence</string> <string name="word_translated_sentence">Translated Sentence</string>
<!-- Content Descriptions --> <string name="cd_filter">Filter notes</string> <string name="cd_expand_note">Expand note details</string>
<!-- Content Descriptions --> <string name="cd_back">Back</string> <string name="cd_menu">Menu</string> <string name="cd_previous_page">Previous page</string> <string name="cd_next_page">Next page</string> <string name="cd_close">Close</string>
<!-- Notes Screen --> <string name="notes_title">My Notes</string> <string name="notes_empty">No notes yet</string> <string name="notes_empty_description">Start reading and save words to build your vocabulary</string> <string name="cd_empty_notes">No notes yet</string> <string name="notes_empty_title">No Notes Found</string> <string name="notes_empty_message">Start reading and save words to build your vocabulary</string> <string name="notes_add_note">Add Note</string> <string name="notes_search_hint">Search notes...</string> <string name="notes_filter_all">All Notes</string> <string name="notes_filter_favorites">Favorites</string> <string name="notes_filter_difficulty">By Difficulty</string> <string name="notes_filter_review">Need Review</string>
<!-- Upload Screen --> <string name="upload_title">Upload Book</string> <string name="upload_select_pdf">Select PDF File</string> <string name="upload_processing">Processing PDF...</string> <string name="upload_extracting">Extracting pages...</string> <string name="upload_translating">Translating content...</string> <string name="upload_saving">Saving book...</string> <string name="upload_success">Book uploaded successfully!</string> <string name="upload_error">Failed to upload book</string>
<!-- Settings Screen --> <string name="settings_title">Settings</string> <string name="settings_appearance">Appearance</string> <string name="settings_theme">Theme</string> <string name="settings_font_size">Font Size</string> <string name="settings_language">Display Language</string> <string name="settings_backup">Backup & Sync</string> <string name="settings_about">About</string>
<!-- Common Actions --> <string name="action_ok">OK</string> <string name="action_cancel">Cancel</string> <string name="action_save">Save</string> <string name="action_delete">Delete</string> <string name="action_edit">Edit</string> <string name="action_share">Share</string> <string name="action_favorite">Favorite</string> <string name="action_bookmark">Bookmark</string> <string name="action_download">Download</string> <string name="action_retry">Retry</string> <string name="action_refresh">Refresh</string>
<!-- Content Descriptions --> <string name="cd_logo">ReadingNook app logo</string> <string name="cd_book_cover">Book cover image</string> <string name="cd_page_content">Page content</string> <string name="cd_add_note">Add vocabulary note</string> <string name="cd_bookmark_page">Bookmark this page</string> <string name="cd_share_book">Share book</string> <string name="cd_settings">App settings</string> <string name="cd_profile">User profile</string> <string name="cd_empty_books">No books illustration</string> <string name="cd_upload_book">Upload new book</string>
<!-- Error Messages --> <string name="error_network">Network connection error</string> <string name="error_server">Server error. Please try again.</string> <string name="error_file_not_found">File not found</string> <string name="error_invalid_file">Invalid file format</string> <string name="error_file_too_large">File size exceeds 50MB limit</string> <string name="error_permission_denied">Permission denied</string> <string name="error_unknown">Unknown error occurred</string>
<!-- Empty States --> <string name="empty_no_books">No books available</string> <string name="empty_no_notes">No notes found</string> <string name="empty_no_results">No results found</string> <string name="empty_no_bookmarks">No bookmarks yet</string> <string name="empty_no_favorites">No favorites yet</string>
<!-- Progress and Status --> <string name="progress_uploading">Uploading...</string> <string name="progress_processing">Processing...</string> <string name="progress_loading">Loading...</string> <string name="progress_syncing">Syncing...</string> <string name="status_completed">Completed</string> <string name="status_in_progress">In Progress</string> <string name="status_downloaded">Downloaded</string> <string name="status_favorite">Favorite</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <!-- App Name and Branding --> <string name="app_name">ReadingNook Memory+</string> <string name="app_tagline">Your Personal Library</string>
<!-- Navigation and Actions --> <string name="nav_library">Library</string> <string name="nav_reader">Reader</string> <string name="nav_notes">Notes</string> <string name="nav_settings">Settings</string>
<!-- Auth Screen --> <string name="auth_welcome">Welcome to ReadingNook</string> <string name="auth_subtitle">Your personal library awaits</string> <string name="auth_login_button">Get Started</string> <string name="auth_guest_mode">Continue as Guest</string> <string name="auth_login_title">Sign In</string> <string name="auth_sign_up_title">Sign Up</string> <string name="auth_sign_up_button">Create Account</string> <string name="auth_forgot_password">Forgot Password?</string> <string name="auth_send_reset_button">Send Reset Link</string> <string name="auth_forgot_password_title">Reset Password</string> <string name="auth_forgot_password_description">Enter your email address and we\'ll send you a link to reset your password.</string>
<!-- Input Hints --> <string name="auth_email_hint">Email address</string> <string name="auth_password_hint">Password</string> <string name="auth_name_hint">Full name</string> <string name="auth_confirm_password_hint">Confirm password</string>
<!-- Bookshelf Screen --> <string name="bookshelf_title">My Library</string> <string name="bookshelf_empty_title">No Books Yet</string> <string name="bookshelf_empty_message">Upload your first PDF book to get started</string> <string name="bookshelf_upload_button">Upload Book</string> <string name="bookshelf_search_hint">Search books...</string> <string name="bookshelf_filter_all">All Books</string> <string name="bookshelf_filter_downloaded">Downloaded</string> <string name="bookshelf_filter_reading">Reading</string> <string name="bookshelf_filter_completed">Completed</string>
<!-- Reader Screen --> <string name="reader_progress">%1$d/%2$d pages</string> <string name="reader_bookmark_added">Bookmark added</string> <string name="reader_bookmark_removed">Bookmark removed</string> <string name="reader_note_created">Note created</string> <string name="reader_menu_bookmarks">Bookmarks</string> <string name="reader_menu_notes">Notes</string> <string name="reader_menu_settings">Settings</string> <string name="reader_menu_translate">Translate</string> <string name="reader_original">Original</string> <string name="reader_translated">Translated</string>
<!-- Word Detail --> <string name="word_english_meaning">English Meaning</string> <string name="word_hinglish_explanation">Hinglish Explanation</string> <string name="word_example_sentence">Example Sentence</string> <string name="word_original_context">Original Context</string> <string name="word_save_to_notes">Save to Notes</string> <string name="word_original_sentence">Original Sentence</string> <string name="word_translated_sentence">Translated Sentence</string>
<!-- Content Descriptions --> <string name="cd_filter">Filter notes</string> <string name="cd_expand_note">Expand note details</string>
<!-- Content Descriptions --> <string name="cd_back">Back</string> <string name="cd_menu">Menu</string> <string name="cd_previous_page">Previous page</string> <string name="cd_next_page">Next page</string> <string name="cd_close">Close</string>
<!-- Notes Screen --> <string name="notes_title">My Notes</string> <string name="notes_empty">No notes yet</string> <string name="notes_empty_description">Start reading and save words to build your vocabulary</string> <string name="cd_empty_notes">No notes yet</string> <string name="notes_empty_title">No Notes Found</string> <string name="notes_empty_message">Start reading and save words to build your vocabulary</string> <string name="notes_add_note">Add Note</string> <string name="notes_search_hint">Search notes...</string> <string name="notes_filter_all">All Notes</string> <string name="notes_filter_favorites">Favorites</string> <string name="notes_filter_difficulty">By Difficulty</string> <string name="notes_filter_review">Need Review</string>
<!-- Upload Screen --> <string name="upload_title">Upload Book</string> <string name="upload_select_pdf">Select PDF File</string> <string name="upload_processing">Processing PDF...</string> <string name="upload_extracting">Extracting pages...</string> <string name="upload_translating">Translating content...</string> <string name="upload_saving">Saving book...</string> <string name="upload_success">Book uploaded successfully!</string> <string name="upload_error">Failed to upload book</string>
<!-- Settings Screen --> <string name="settings_title">Settings</string> <string name="settings_appearance">Appearance</string> <string name="settings_theme">Theme</string> <string name="settings_font_size">Font Size</string> <string name="settings_language">Display Language</string> <string name="settings_backup">Backup & Sync</string> <string name="settings_about">About</string>
<!-- Common Actions --> <string name="action_ok">OK</string> <string name="action_cancel">Cancel</string> <string name="action_close">Close</string> <string name="action_save">Save</string> <string name="action_delete">Delete</string> <string name="action_edit">Edit</string> <string name="action_share">Share</string> <string name="action_favorite">Favorite</string> <string name="action_bookmark">Bookmark</string> <string name="action_download">Download</string> <string name="action_retry">Retry</string> <string name="action_refresh">Refresh</string>
<!-- Content Descriptions --> <string name="cd_logo">ReadingNook app logo</string> <string name="cd_book_cover">Book cover image</string> <string name="cd_page_content">Page content</string> <string name="cd_add_note">Add vocabulary note</string> <string name="cd_bookmark_page">Bookmark this page</string> <string name="cd_share_book">Share book</string> <string name="cd_settings">App settings</string> <string name="cd_profile">User profile</string> <string name="cd_empty_books">No books illustration</string> <string name="cd_upload_book">Upload new book</string>
<!-- Error Messages --> <string name="error_network">Network connection error</string> <string name="error_server">Server error. Please try again.</string> <string name="error_file_not_found">File not found</string> <string name="error_invalid_file">Invalid file format</string> <string name="error_file_too_large">File size exceeds 50MB limit</string> <string name="error_permission_denied">Permission denied</string> <string name="error_unknown">Unknown error occurred</string>
<!-- Empty States --> <string name="empty_no_books">No books available</string> <string name="empty_no_notes">No notes found</string> <string name="empty_no_results">No results found</string> <string name="empty_no_bookmarks">No bookmarks yet</string> <string name="empty_no_favorites">No favorites yet</string>
<!-- Progress and Status --> <string name="progress_uploading">Uploading...</string> <string name="progress_processing">Processing...</string> <string name="progress_loading">Loading...</string> <string name="progress_syncing">Syncing...</string> <string name="status_completed">Completed</string> <string name="status_in_progress">In Progress</string> <string name="status_downloaded">Downloaded</string> <string name="status_favorite">Favorite</string> </resources>
